title: cuttsia viburnea
intro: Cuttsia viburnea, also known as kutaja or kutaja tree, is a tropical plant native to India and Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its leaves, bark, and roots are used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
